m2-1-u2.title: Lesson 2 Why Didn't You See a Doctor?

vocab.sentence: Wear a mask in the hospital.

vocab.sentence_chinese: 爸爸傳了一則訊息給我。

vocab.sentence: I stayed home because I was sick.

vocab.sentence_chinese: 臺灣是一個美麗的國家。

vocab.sentence: Walking is good for your health.
It was cold, so I wore a coat.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 天氣很冷，所以我穿了大衣。

vocab.sentence: Exercise is good for your body.

phrases.sentence: Jerry caught a cold last week.
You have a fever? That's too bad.
As for me, I feel fine.

tips.label: 授與動詞
tips.text: 人放前面可直接接受詞；物放前面時，要用 to 或 for 接人。

tips.label: 問原因
tips.text: 用 Why did／didn't + 主詞 + 原形動詞詢問原因，回答常用 because。

tips.label: 原因與結果
tips.text: because 後面接原因子句；so 前面說原因、後面說結果。

notes.title: 授與動詞的兩種句型
notes.rule: S + V + 人 + 物；S + V + 物 + to／for + 人
notes.description: give、send、show、write 常用 to；buy、make、cook、find 常用 for。直接受詞是 it 或 them 時，只能用「物 + to／for + 人」的句型。
examples: Dad gave a card to me.

notes.title: 以 why 引導的問句
notes.rule: Why + did／didn't + 主詞 + 原形動詞 ...?
notes.description: why 用來詢問原因。回答可用完整的主要子句加 because 子句，也可只回答 Because + 子句。
examples: Why did she see a doctor?
She saw a doctor because she was sick.
Why didn't he come? Because he had a fever.

notes.title: because、so 與 because of
notes.rule: 主句 + because + 子句；主句, so + 子句；主句 + because of + 名詞
notes.description: because 後面必須是有主詞和動詞的子句；because of 後面接名詞或名詞片語。because 和 so 都表示因果，但不可同時放在同一句。
examples: I stayed home because I was sick.
I was sick, so I stayed home.
I stayed home because of my fever.

quiz.question: Dad ___ me some medicine yesterday.
quiz.hint: yesterday 表示過去時間，give 要用過去式 gave。

quiz.question: Amy sent a message ___ her doctor.
quiz.hint: send 物給人時，物後面用 to 接人。

quiz.question: Mom ___ her son a birthday cake last night.
quiz.hint: last night 是過去時間，make 要用 made。

quiz.question: We bought a warm coat ___ our sister.
quiz.hint: buy 東西為某人做時，用 for 接人。

quiz.question: The nurse showed ___ the medicine.
quiz.hint: show 後面的人是受詞，要用受格 us。

quiz.question: Kevin wrote a card ___ his sick friend.
quiz.hint: write 物給某人時，通常用 to 接人。

quiz.question: Please give ___ to her.
quiz.hint: 當物是代名詞 it 時，要用 give it to + 人。

quiz.question: My aunt ___ us a big dinner yesterday.
quiz.hint: yesterday 表示過去，cook 要用 cooked。

quiz.question: Why did Lisa ___ a doctor?
quiz.hint: did 後面要接原形動詞，所以用 see。

quiz.question: Why didn't Ben ___ to school yesterday?
quiz.hint: didn't 後面要接原形動詞 go。

quiz.question: Why did you stay home? — ___ I was sick.
quiz.hint: 回答 why 問句、說明原因時，用 Because。

quiz.question: Why didn't Mia call you? — Because she ___ busy.
quiz.hint: 事情發生在過去，she 搭配 was。

quiz.question: Jerry stayed home ___ he caught a cold.
quiz.hint: 後面是原因子句 he caught a cold，因此用 because。

quiz.question: It was cold, ___ I put on my coat.
quiz.hint: 前面是原因、後面是結果，用 so。

quiz.question: I didn't eat ice cream ___ I had a sore throat.
quiz.hint: because 後面接完整子句，說明不吃冰淇淋的原因。

quiz.question: The medicine helped her, ___ she felt better.
quiz.hint: 前句是原因、後句是結果，所以用 so。

quiz.question: Tom missed class because of his ___.
quiz.hint: because of 後面要接名詞或名詞片語，fever 是名詞。

quiz.question: The doctor treated Kevin because he ___ very sick.
quiz.hint: treated 是過去式，原因子句也用過去式 was。

quiz.question: ___ she had a headache, she saw a doctor.
quiz.hint: 句首說明原因，用 Because，後面接完整子句。

quiz.question: Mason had a fever, ___ he didn't go to school.
quiz.hint: 發燒是原因，沒上學是結果，用 so。

quiz.question: I wore a mask ___ I was in the hospital.
quiz.hint: because 後面的 I was in the hospital 是完整原因子句。

quiz.question: Nina was tired, ___ she went to bed early.
quiz.hint: 累是原因，早睡是結果，因此用 so。

quiz.question: Why didn't you answer my call? — ___ I was at the hospital.
quiz.hint: 這是在回答原因，使用 Because。

quiz.question: Why did Mr. Lee stay home? — Because he ___ a cold.
quiz.hint: 過去發生的感冒，要用 caught。

quiz.question: The teacher ___ the students a storybook.
quiz.hint: 主詞是單數且句子敘述過去，動詞用 gave。

quiz.question: Please show the picture ___ me.
quiz.hint: show 物給人時，物後面用 to 接人。

quiz.question: Mom sent ___ to the doctor.
quiz.hint: 若直接受詞是代名詞，應寫 send it to + 人；本題的 a message 不能省略受詞對象，因此完整句需再加 to the doctor，四個選項中只有 D 能和題幹組成正確句。

quiz.question: Dad ___ a bowl of soup for me.
quiz.hint: 句子描述已發生的事，make 用過去式 made。

quiz.question: Lucy wrote her grandma a letter. = Lucy wrote a letter ___ her grandma.
quiz.hint: write 物給人時，改寫句用 to 接人。

quiz.question: We bought some medicine ___ our sick son.
quiz.hint: buy 東西為某人使用時，用 for。

quiz.question: The nurse sent ___ to him.
quiz.hint: 直接受詞是 it 時，應用 send it to + 人 的句型。

quiz.question: Why did your brother ___ a coat?
quiz.hint: Why did 後面要接原形動詞 buy。

quiz.question: Why didn't Amy go out? — Because she ___ a fever.
quiz.hint: 問句用 didn't 表示過去，回答用 had。

quiz.question: He wore warm clothes ___ it was cold.
quiz.hint: it was cold 是完整原因子句，前面用 because。

quiz.question: I was sick, ___ I saw a doctor.
quiz.hint: 生病是原因、看醫生是結果，用 so。

quiz.question: Because of the rain, we ___ at home.
quiz.hint: because of the rain 說明過去的原因，主要子句用過去式 stayed。

quiz.question: She was happy because her health ___ better.
quiz.hint: was 是過去式，健康變好也用 got。

quiz.question: They didn't play outside because of the ___ weather.
quiz.hint: because of 後面接名詞片語；bad weather 是名詞片語。

quiz.question: ___ it was too late, he called a taxi.
quiz.hint: 句首說明叫計程車的原因，用 Because。

quiz.question: My leg hurt, ___ I couldn't run.
quiz.hint: 腿痛是原因、不能跑是結果，因此用 so。

quiz.question: I went to bed early ___ I was tired.
quiz.hint: because 後面接完整的原因子句 I was tired。

quiz.question: Peter missed the bus, ___ he got up late.
quiz.hint: 前面是結果，後面要用 because 接原因。

quiz.question: Why did Cathy take medicine? — ___ she had a headache.
quiz.hint: 回答 why 的原因時，用 Because。

quiz.question: The doctor ___ the girl some medicine.
quiz.hint: 描述已做的治療，give 用過去式 gave。

quiz.question: My sister made a card ___ me.
quiz.hint: make 物為某人做時，使用 for。

quiz.question: Dad showed his new coat ___ us.
quiz.hint: show 物給人時，用 to 接人。

quiz.question: Mom wrote ___ a message last night.
quiz.hint: write 後面的人是間接受詞，要用受格 her。

quiz.question: My uncle ___ his son a new bike.
quiz.hint: 句子敘述過去，buy 要用過去式 bought。

quiz.question: Why did your mom ___ you?
quiz.hint: did 後面要接原形動詞 call。

quiz.question: I wore a mask ___ the doctor told me to.
quiz.hint: the doctor told me to 是原因子句，前面用 because。

vocab.sentence: Wear a mask in the hospital.

vocab.sentence_chinese: 爸爸傳了一則訊息給我。

vocab.sentence: I stayed home because I was sick.

vocab.sentence_chinese: 臺灣是一個美麗的國家。

vocab.sentence: Walking is good for your health.
It was cold, so I wore a coat.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 天氣很冷，所以我穿了大衣。

vocab.sentence: Exercise is good for your body.

phrases.sentence: Jerry caught a cold last week.
You have a fever? That's too bad.
As for me, I feel fine.

grammar.sentence: Dad gave me a new coat yesterday.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 爸爸昨天給我一件新大衣。

grammar.sentence: Mom sent a message to the doctor.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 媽媽傳了一則訊息給醫生。

grammar.sentence: My aunt made soup for me.
The nurse showed us the medicine.
Kevin wrote a card to his friend.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Kevin 寫了一張卡片給朋友。

grammar.sentence: Please give it to her now.
We bought some fruit for Mom.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們買了一些水果給媽媽。

grammar.sentence: Why did Lily see a doctor?
Why didn't Sam go to school?
She stayed home because she was sick.
He called because he was worried.
Because I had a fever, I stayed home.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 因為我發燒，所以我待在家。

grammar.sentence: It was cold, so I wore a coat.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 天氣很冷，所以我穿了大衣。

grammar.sentence: My knee hurt, so I walked slowly.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我的膝蓋痛，所以我走得很慢。

grammar.sentence: Jerry caught a cold because of the rain.
She missed class because of her headache.
Dad gave the medicine to me.
The doctor wrote me a note.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 醫生寫了一張便條給我。

grammar.sentence: My sister cooked dinner for us.
Why did you put on a mask?
Why didn't she answer the call?
I took medicine because my throat hurt.
He was tired, so he went home.
Because it rained, we stayed inside.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 因為下雨，我們待在室內。

grammar.sentence: They canceled the game because of rain.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他們因為下雨取消比賽。

grammar.sentence: Mom sent it to him yesterday.
The teacher showed a picture to us.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 老師給我們看一張圖片。

grammar.sentence: Why did your arm hurt yesterday?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你的手臂昨天為什麼痛？

grammar.sentence: I wore warm clothes because it was cold.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我因為天氣冷而穿暖和的衣服。

grammar.sentence: She felt better, so she smiled.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 她感覺好些了，所以她微笑。
